subject: [PATCH v3 08/10] nfsd: split nfsd4_copy into transient and durable async copy objects

2026-07-10.patch_summary: This patch splits the nfsd4_copy object into two separate objects: a transient object for per-COMPOUND arguments and a durable object for asynchronous copy operations. The durable object, struct nfsd4_async_copy, embeds the operation parameters/result from the transient object and adds fields necessary for its lifetime as a worker kthread, such as reaper linkage and CB_OFFLOAD callback. This separation is intended to prevent lifetime bugs that arose from the dual identity of the original nfsd4_copy object.
